name: Heading
description: Sectioning heading whose rendered HTML element follows the level prop (h1–h6) via semantics.elementByProp, with a visual size ramp on the existing control type scale — document outline and visual weight are deliberately independent axes. Text nodes carry no element semantics, so only code renders the element itself.

props.name: level
props.description: Document outline level — drives the rendered element (h1–h6) and the size ramp.

props.name: size
props.description: Visual size on the control type scale — independent of the document outline level.
